description: Convert SAM or BAM files to FASTQ format
author: GenePattern
plan:
## Picard.SamToFastq GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Picard.SamToFastq is a GenePattern module that Convert SAM or BAM files to FASTQ format

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 9 parameters:
- Required: input.file, per.read.group, re-reverse.bases, include.non.pf.reads
- Optional: clipping.attribute, clipping.action, clipping.action.quality.value, fastq.output.prefix.1, fastq.output.prefix.2

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>jargs.jar<path.separator><libdir>SamToFastq.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-samToFastq.jar org.genepattern.sam.SamToFastqWrapper -i<input.file> -g<per.read.group> -r<re-reverse.bases> -p<include.non.pf.reads> -c<clipping.attribute> -a<clipping.action> -q<clipping.action.quality.value> -o<fastq.output.prefix.1> -f<fastq.output.prefix.2>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: per.read.group
parameters.description: Whether to output a fastq file per read group

parameters.name: re-reverse.bases
parameters.description: Whether to re-reverse bases and qualities of reads with negative strand flag set

parameters.name: clipping.attribute
parameters.description: Attribute that stores the position at which the SAM record should be clipped

parameters.name: clipping.action
parameters.description: Action to take with clipped reads when a clipping attribute is specified

parameters.name: clipping.action.quality.value
parameters.description: Value to set base qualities to when clipping action is "change base quality values"

parameters.name: fastq.output.prefix.1
parameters.description: The fastq output file name for single-end fastq or first end of a paired fastq. Only specify when "per read group" is "no".

parameters.name: fastq.output.prefix.2
parameters.description: The second end of a paired fastq. Only specify when "per read group" is "no".
